MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on the Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Judge: Monica F. Wiley, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Katy Bersamin, #11722.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq., of Brayton Purcell, LLP, appeared for all plaintiffs.
Aaron Minnus, Esq. appeared with Wrongful Death Heir Denice Schellinger, who was placed under oath and examined.
Jason M. Skaggs, Esq. appeared with Wrongful Death Heir Bonny Schellinger, who was placed under oath and examiend.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral an documentary, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival and wrongful death actions, in the following proportions:

Bonny Schellinger - as Wrongful Death Heir - 70%

Denice Schellinger - as Wrongful Death Heir - 30%

The law firm of Brayton Purcell LLP shall recover from the net settlement funds of $59,976.47 the sum of $1,681.00 as reasonable attorney's fees and costs.

All future settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Matter was taken under submission by the Court. Once signed, the Order After Hearing shall be mailed to the parties.

Jason M. Skaggs, Esq. appeared with Wrongful Death Heir Bonny Schellinger, who was placed under oath and examiend.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral an documentary, and good cause appearing, it is hereby Ordered that the following are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival and wrongful death actions, in the following proportions:

Bonny Schellinger - Wrongful Death Heir - 50%
